answer:
\boxed{Henry is hiding the existence of Indefer Jones' **second will**, which names Isabel Brodrick as the rightful heir instead of him, to avoid losing the estate and facing legal, social, and moral consequences.}

He knows the original will (witnessed by tenants) cannot be found, so he fears exposure if the new will is discovered, which would force him to relinquish Llanfeare and its inheritance. His procrastination stems from guilt over the deception and dread of the scandal it would unleash.
